title: King Cole Big Value Chunky - Grey (547)
features: King Cole's Big Value chunky knitting yarn is fashionable, cosy and comes in a wide variety of shades. Made from 100% premium acrylic, this chunky knitting wool can be machine washed at 40c and tumble dried on a cool setting, making it a great choice for beautiful sweaters and scarves to keep you warm during the cold winter months.

This Big Value chunky yarn is available in the following shades: Black (554),Denim (555), Blue Heaven (559), Bluegrass (611), Bright Pink (549), Bronze (1972), Caramel (546), Charcoal (3281), Cream (551), Dusty Pink (639), Fjord (1974), Green (833), Grey (547), Heather (556), Mango (1746), Moss (548), Navy (550), Petrol (552), Purple (3105), Red (553), Rose (1542), White (822), Wine (545) or Yellow (828).

The wool is available in 100g balls and the length is approximately 152 metres/167 yards. It is recommended that you use 6mm needles (UK 4/USA 10) for a 10cm x 10cm (4" x 4") tension square of 14sts x 20 rows.
Photographs are for illustrative purposes only and shades may vary across computer monitors.
